    Journal metrics
    • 23.2
      Impact Factor
      The Impact Factor measur= es the average number of citations received in a particular year by papers = published in the journal during the two preceding years.
      Journal Citatio= n Reports 2025 (Clarivate Analytics, 2026)
    • 34.9
      C= iteScore
      CiteScore measures the averag= e citations received per peer-reviewed document. CiteScore values are based= on citation counts in a range of four years to peer-reviewed documents pub= lished in the same four calendar years, divided by the number of these docu= ments in these same four years.
      2025 CiteScore =C2=A9 2026 Elsevier B.V.=
    • 3
      Time to first editorial decision
      The median number of days from submission to first decision (= desk accept or send the paper to review or desk reject).
      =
    • 28=
      Acceptance to online publication
      For papers published online, the median number of days from accept= ance to first online publication.

    About

    Cell Host & Microbe

    <= div class=3D"cover-image__meta">

    Cell Host & Microbe was launched in March 2007. The journal's= mission is to provide a forum for the exchange of ideas and concepts betwe= en scientists studying the microbe with those studying the host immune, cel= l biological, and molecular response upon colonization or infection by a mi= crobe.

    More

    This journal offers the option to publish open access

    Authors may choose to publish open access by paying an article publishin= g charge.

    Article publishing charge: $10,400
    To provide gold open access, this journal has a pu= blication fee which needs to be met by the authors or their research funder= s for each article published open access

    Collections

    Bugs and Drugs

    Cancer Microbiology

    <= /div>

    Plants

    The Virome

    =20

    More from Cell Host & Microbe

    Follow us on X (formerly Twitter)

    We bring you the latest information and insights from the forefront of h= ost-microbe research.

    Plants and Microbes: Growing Insights Op= ens in new window  

    This Special Issue cultivates articles that discuss the intimate relatio= nship between plant health and microbes. We know it will grow on you!

    Microbes and Nutrient Dynamics

    Feast on our Special Issue that provides cutting-edge insight into how m= icrobes have co-evolved with their host for effective nutrient acquisition = and utilization.

    Microbial Survival Guide

    This Special Issue presents a guide of microbial adaptation and mechanis= ms of survival in the adverse conditions often faced.

    Cell Host & Microbe ISSN: = 1934-6069 (online); 1931-3128 (print)

    Cookie Preference Center

    We us= e cookies which are necessary to make our site work. We may also use additi= onal cookies to analyse, improve and personalise our content and your digit= al experience. For more information, see our Cookie Policy and = the list of Google Ad-Tech Vendors.

    You may choose not to allow some types of cookies. However, blocking some t= ypes may impact your experience of our site and the services we are able to= offer. See the different category headings below to find out more or chang= e your settings.

    Manage Consent Preferences

    <= div class=3D"ot-acc-hdr ot-always-active-group">

    Strictly Necessary Cookies

    Always active

    These cookies are necessary for the website to fun= ction and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set = in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, = such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. Y= ou can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some= parts of the site will not then work.

    =

    P= erformance Cookies

    These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we c= an measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know wh= ich pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around t= he site.

    <= /div>
    =

    Targeting Cookies

    These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising p= artners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your int= erests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. If you do not allow th= ese cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

.col-print-2 { width: 17%; float: left; } [dir=3D"rtl"] .col-print-2 { float: right; } .col-print-3 { width: 25%; float: left; } [dir=3D"rtl"] .col-print-3 { float: right; } .col-print-4 { width: 33%; { float: right; } .col-print-9 { width: 75%; float: left; } [dir=3D"rtl"] .col-print-9 { float: right; } .col-print-10 { width: 83%; float: left; } [dir=3D"rtl"] .col-print-10 { float: right; } .col-print-11 { width: 92%; float: left; } [dir=3D"rtl"] .col-print-11 { float: right; } .col-print-12 { width: 100%; float: left; } [dir=3D"rtl"] .col-print-12 { float: right; } .hidden-print { display: none !important; } html { right: 0px; left: 0px; width: auto; min-height: 0px; margin: 0px; ov= erflow: auto; } .content { min-height: 0px; padding-top: 0px; } .container, .header--first-row.container { width: 100%; max-width: 100%; } .contact__nav, .coolBar, .header__quick-menu, .loi__banner, .main-nav, .pb-= ad, .pb-las, .sitemap { display: none; } .header.fixed { position: static !important; } footer a img { margin: 0px; } .article-section__inline-figure figure { width: 100%; float: none; } .accordion__content { display: block !important; } figure, main { display: block; } figure { margin: 1em 40px; } hr { box-sizing: content-box; height: 0px; overflow: visible; } pre { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; } a { background-color: transparent; } a:active, a:hover { outline-width: 0px; } abbr[title] { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; borde= r-bottom-color: currentcolor; text-decoration: underline dotted; } b, strong { font-weight: bolder; } code, kbd, samp { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; } dfn { font-style: italic; } mark { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } small { font-size: 80%; } sub, sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-ali= gn: baseline; } sub { bottom: -0.25em; } sup { top: -0.5em; } audio, video { display: inline-block; } audio:not([controls]) { display: none; height: 0px; } img { border-style: none; } svg:not(:root) { overflow: hidden; } button, input, optgroup, select, textarea { rotate(180de= g); } #smartbanner { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: -82px; border-bottom: 1p= x solid rgb(232, 232, 232); width: 100%; height: 78px; font-family: "Helvet= ica Neue", sans-serif; background: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(244, 24= 4, 244) 0%, rgb(205, 205, 205) 100%); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 1p= x 2px; z-index: 9998; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; overflow: hidden= ; text-size-adjust: none; } #smartbanner, html.sb-animation { transition: 0.3s; } #smartbanner .sb-container { margin: 0px auto; } #smartbanner .sb-close { position: absolute; left: 5px; top: 5px; display: = block; border: 2px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 14px; height: 14px; fon= t-family: ArialRoundedMTBold, Arial; font-size: 15px; line-height: 15px; te= xt-align: center; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background: rgb(7, 7, 7); text= -decoration: none; text-shadow: none; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: rgba= (0, 0, 0, 0.4) 0px 2px 3px; -webkit-font-smoothing: subpixel-antialiased; } #smartbanner .sb-close:active { font-size: 13px; color: rgb(170, 170, 170);= } #smartbanner .sb-icon { position: absolute; left: 30px; top: 10px; display:= block; width: 57px; height: 57px; background: 0% 0% / cover rgba(0, 0, 0,= 0.6); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 1px 3px; } #smartbanner.no-icon .sb-icon { display: none; } #smartbanner .sb-info { position: absolute; left: 98px; top: 18px; width: 4= 4%; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(106,= 106, 106); text-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) 0px 1px 0px; } #smartbanner #smartbanner.no-icon .sb-info { left: 34px; } #smartbanner .sb-info strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; color: rgb(= 77, 77, 77); line-height: 18px; } #smartbanner .sb-info > span { display: block; } #smartbanner .sb-info em { font-style: normal; text-transform: uppercase; } #smartbanner .sb-button { position: absolute; right: 20px; top: 24px; borde= r: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); padding: 0px 10px; min-width: 10%; height:= 24px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 24px; text-align: center; font-weight:= bold; color: rgb(106, 106, 106); background: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, = rgb(239, 239, 239) 0%, rgb(220, 220, 220) 100%); text-transform: uppercase;= text-decoration: none; text-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) 0px 1px 0px; = border-radius: 3px; box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 0px 1px 0px, rgba(= 255, 255, 255, 0.7) 0px 1px 0px inset; } #smartbanner .sb-button:active, #smartbanner .sb-button:hover { background:= -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(220, 220, 220) 0%, rgb(239, 239, 239) 100= %); } #smartbanner .sb-icon.gloss::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left:= 0px; top: -1px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); width: 100= %; height: 50%; background: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgba(255, 255, 255= , 0.7) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 100%); border-radius: 10px 10px 12px 12= px; } #smartbanner.android { border-color: rgb(136, 177, 49) rgb(33, 34, 40) rgb(= 33, 34, 40); background: url("data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhCAAIAIABAFVVVf/= //yH5BAEHAAEALAAAAAAIAAgAAAINRG4XudroGJBRsYcxKAA7") rgb(61, 61, 61); border= -top-width: 5px; border-top-style: solid; box-shadow: none; } #smartbanner.android .sb-close { border: 0px; width: 17px; height: 17px; li= ne-height: 17px; color: rgb(177, 177, 179); background: rgb(28, 30, 33); te= 26px 7px 16= px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px; clear: both; width: 100%; b= order-bottom: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); display: none; height: 32px; } #brandingRow a { text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-und= erline-offset: 2px; display: inline-flex; } #brandingRow a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } body.partner #brandingRow { display: block; background-color: rgb(255, 255,= 255); padding: 7px 26px 7px 30px; color: rgb(0, 125, 188); } body.partner #brandingRow a { color: rgb(0, 125, 188); } body:not(.partner) #brandingRow img { height: 18px; width: auto; } #brandingRowRight { display: inline; float: right; width: auto; padding: 0p= x; margin: 0px; } svg#cp_logo { float: none; height: 54px; width: 54px; margin-left: 0px; mar= gin-top: 0px; } #logosWrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } body:not(.partner) .journal-logos img { max-height: 50px; } body:not(.partner) .journal-logos:nth-of-type(2) img { height: 20px; margin= -top: 6px; max-height: 20px !important; } .ux3 .journal-logos + .journal-logos { margin-left: 16px; } .header__left-side #cpIconLnk { margin-top: 6px; } body:not(.partner) header .journal-logos:nth-of-type(2) { max-width: unset;= } footer hr { display: block; } @media screen and (max-width: 600px) { #brandingRow { font-size: 12px; } .header.base.fixed { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255) !importa= nt; } } @media screen and (max-width: 768px) { #brandingRow { padding: 7px 18px 7px 16px; height: 32px; } svg#cp_logo { margin-right: 10px; } .header.base.fixed { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255) !importa= nt; } } @media screen and (max-width: 768px) { a#cpIconLnk { display: none; } body:not(.partner) #brandingRow { display: block; } } header .header__wrapper, header .header__wrapper > div > div { margin: 0px;= } .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:first-of-type { width: 55%; } .header__wrapper.clearfix .col-xs-6:nth-of-type(2) { width: 45%; } @media only screen and (max-width: 768px) { body:not(.partner) .journal-logos + .journal-logos { display: none !impor= tant; } body.partner #brandingRow { padding: 7px 16px; } } @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { body:not(.partner) .journal-logos + .journal-logos { display: block !impo= rtant; } } @media only screen and (min-width: 1240px) { #brandingRow.mobileblue { display:
